task_objective: Text-to-Nail Art Generation with Depth Map

depth_map_reference.description: Preserve nail shape, curvature, and three-dimensional structure from depth map

workflow.step_1_depth_analysis: Parse depth map elements with strict precision, including nail shape, curvature, three-dimensional structure, and surface topology.
workflow.step_2_composite_generation: No text, Straight-on front view, macro nail photography, Precisely apply the design elements from the text prompt onto the nail surface defined by the depth map. The nail art must fit naturally with the nail's three-dimensional structure with seamless integration, no visible artifacts, and physically accurate material properties. Configure four distinct design variations in a 2x2 grid, Each variation must clearly reveal the nail art's overall design and fine details (color application, pattern continuity, decorative element placement). Preserve the complete structural integrity from the depth map — nail shape and curvature remain untouched.
